title: Logging Decorator
description: Create a Python decorator to log the execution time of a function.

title: Infinite Sequence Generator
description: Write a Python generator to produce an infinite sequence of numbers.

title: Authentication Decorator
description: Design a Python decorator to check if a user is authenticated before executing a function.

title: Fibonacci Sequence Generator
description: Implement a Python generator to generate the Fibonacci sequence.

title: Retry Decorator
description: Create a Python decorator to retry a function a specified number of times if it fails.

title: Prime Number Generator
description: Write a Python generator to generate prime numbers.

title: Timing Decorator
description: Design a Python decorator to measure the execution time of a function and print it.

title: Cartesian Product Generator
description: Implement a Python generator to generate the Cartesian product of two lists.

title: Caching Decorator
description: Create a Python decorator to cache the results of a function.

title: Permutations Generator
description: Write a Python generator to generate all permutations of a list.

title: Student Grades Analysis
description: Given a dataset of student grades, calculate the average grade for each subject and determine the student with the highest overall grade.

title: Sales Data Visualization
description: Load a sales dataset into a pandas DataFrame and create a bar chart to display the total sales for each region.

title: Handling Missing Values
description: Given a dataset with missing values, write a function to replace missing values with the mean of the respective column and then calculate the standard deviation of each column.

title: Data Filtering and Sorting
description: Filter a dataset to include only rows where the age is greater than 30 and the country is 'USA', then sort the resulting DataFrame by salary in descending order.

title: Grouping and Aggregation
description: Group a dataset by 'department' and calculate the average salary for each department, then sort the result by average salary in ascending order.

title: Merging Datasets
description: Merge two datasets based on a common column 'customer_id' and calculate the total spend for each customer.

title: Data Cleaning and Preprocessing
description: Clean a dataset by removing duplicates, handling missing values, and converting data types as necessary, then create a histogram to visualize the distribution of a specified column.

title: Time Series Analysis
description: Load a time series dataset into a pandas DataFrame and calculate the rolling mean and standard deviation of a specified column over a window of 7 days.

title: Pivot Tables
description: Create a pivot table to display the sum of sales for each region and product, then use the pivot table to calculate the total sales for each region.

title: Data Transformation
description: Transform a dataset by converting categorical variables into numerical variables using one-hot encoding and then scale the numerical variables using standardization.

title: Singleton Pattern Implementation
description: Create a Singleton class in Java that restricts object creation for a class to only one instance, providing a global point of access to that instance.

title: Factory Method Pattern for Vehicle Creation
description: Design a Factory Method pattern in Java to create different types of vehicles (car, truck, bike) without specifying the exact class of object that will be created.

title: Observer Pattern for Weather Updates
description: Implement the Observer pattern in Java to notify registered observers when the weather changes, demonstrating a one-to-many dependency between objects.

title: Decorator Pattern for Coffee Shop
description: Apply the Decorator pattern in Java to add extra features (milk, sugar, whipped cream) to a beverage, allowing for dynamic and flexible modifications to an object.

title: Strategy Pattern for Payment Methods
description: Design a Strategy pattern in Java to encapsulate different payment methods (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) and allow clients to choose a payment strategy at runtime.

title: Adaptor Pattern for Database Connection
description: Implement the Adaptor pattern in Java to adapt an existing database connection class to work with a new API, allowing for compatibility between two incompatible interfaces.

title: Composite Pattern for File System
description: Apply the Composite pattern in Java to represent a file system with directories and files, demonstrating a tree-like structure of objects.

title: Proxy Pattern for Image Loading
description: Design a Proxy pattern in Java to create an object that acts as an intermediary for loading and displaying images, optimizing resource usage and improving performance.

title: Command Pattern for Remote Control
description: Implement the Command pattern in Java to encapsulate requests as objects, allowing for a flexible and extensible design for a remote control system.

title: Bridge Pattern for Game Development
description: Apply the Bridge pattern in Java to separate an object's abstraction from its implementation, allowing for greater flexibility and decoupling in game development.

title: Thread Synchronization
description: Implement a program that uses Java's built-in synchronization mechanisms to protect a shared resource from concurrent access by multiple threads.

title: Producer-Consumer Problem
description: Write a Java program that demonstrates the producer-consumer problem using threads and a shared buffer.

title: Deadlock Detection
description: Create a Java program that detects deadlocks in a system with multiple threads and shared resources.

title: Thread Pool Implementation
description: Implement a thread pool in Java that can manage a pool of worker threads to execute tasks concurrently.

title: Synchronized Collection Operations
description: Write a Java program that demonstrates how to perform synchronized operations on a shared collection using the Collections.synchronizedList() method.

title: Dining Philosophers Problem
description: Implement a Java program that solves the dining philosophers problem using threads and synchronization mechanisms.

title: Concurrent Data Structures
description: Create a Java program that demonstrates the use of concurrent data structures such as ConcurrentHashMap and CopyOnWriteArrayList.

title: Thread Communication
description: Write a Java program that demonstrates how to establish communication between threads using the wait() and notify() methods.

title: Starvation and Livelock
description: Implement a Java program that demonstrates how to avoid starvation and livelock in a system with multiple threads and shared resources.

title: Atomic Variables
description: Create a Java program that demonstrates the use of atomic variables to update shared variables in a thread-safe manner.

title: Memory Leak Detector
description: Write a C++ program to detect memory leaks in a given code snippet. The program should be able to identify dynamically allocated memory that is not deallocated.

title: Pointer Arithmetic
description: Create a C++ function that takes an array and its size as input, and returns a pointer to the middle element of the array using pointer arithmetic.

title: Dynamic Array Implementation
description: Implement a dynamic array in C++ using pointers. The array should be able to resize itself when elements are added or removed.

title: Memory Pool Implementation
description: Design a memory pool in C++ using pointers. The memory pool should be able to allocate and deallocate memory blocks of varying sizes.

title: Pointer to Pointer
description: Write a C++ program that demonstrates the use of pointers to pointers. The program should be able to allocate memory for an array of integers and then use a pointer to pointer to access the elements of the array.

title: Smart Pointer Implementation
description: Implement a basic smart pointer in C++ using pointers. The smart pointer should be able to automatically manage the memory it points to.

title: Memory Fragmentation
description: Write a C++ program that demonstrates memory fragmentation. The program should be able to allocate and deallocate memory blocks of varying sizes and then measure the amount of fragmented memory.

title: Dangling Pointer
description: Create a C++ program that demonstrates a dangling pointer. The program should be able to allocate memory for an integer, assign its address to a pointer, and then deallocate the memory. The program should then attempt to access the memory through the dangling pointer.

title: Wildcard Pointer
description: Write a C++ program that demonstrates the use of a wildcard pointer (void*). The program should be able to allocate memory for different data types and then use a wildcard pointer to access the memory.

title: Memory Corruption
description: Create a C++ program that demonstrates memory corruption. The program should be able to allocate memory for an array of integers and then write beyond the bounds of the array, causing memory corruption.

title: Vector Operations
description: Write a C++ program to demonstrate various operations on vectors such as insertion, deletion, and searching.

title: Map Implementation
description: Create a C++ program to implement a simple phonebook using a map, where names are keys and phone numbers are values.

title: Vector Sorting
description: Write a C++ program to sort a vector of integers in ascending and descending order using the sort function from the algorithm library.

title: Map Iteration
description: Create a C++ program to iterate over a map and print all its key-value pairs.

title: Vector Resize
description: Write a C++ program to demonstrate the use of the resize function to change the size of a vector.

title: Map Erase
description: Create a C++ program to erase elements from a map based on a given key.

title: Vector Find
description: Write a C++ program to find an element in a vector using the find function from the algorithm library.

title: Map Clear
description: Create a C++ program to clear all elements from a map.

title: Vector Merge
description: Write a C++ program to merge two vectors into one.

title: Map Intersection
description: Create a C++ program to find the intersection of two maps (i.e., the key-value pairs common to both maps).

title: Promise Chaining
description: Implement a function that chains multiple promises together to perform a series of asynchronous operations

title: Async/Await Error Handling
description: Write a function that uses async/await to handle errors in a series of asynchronous operations

title: Concurrent Promises
description: Implement a function that uses Promise.all() to run multiple asynchronous operations concurrently

title: Debouncing with Promises
description: Write a function that uses promises to debounce a function, ensuring it only runs after a certain delay

title: Promise.race() Implementation
description: Implement a function that uses Promise.race() to run multiple asynchronous operations and return the first one to complete

title: Async/Await with Timeout
description: Write a function that uses async/await to implement a timeout for an asynchronous operation

title: Caching with Promises
description: Implement a function that uses promises to cache the results of an asynchronous operation

title: Retry Mechanism with Promises
description: Write a function that uses promises to implement a retry mechanism for an asynchronous operation

title: Promise.allSettled() Implementation
description: Implement a function that uses Promise.allSettled() to run multiple asynchronous operations and return their results

title: Async/Await with Recursive Functions
description: Write a function that uses async/await to implement a recursive function for an asynchronous operation

title: To-Do List App
description: Create a To-Do List app that allows users to add, remove, and edit tasks. The tasks should be stored in an array and updated in real-time in the DOM.

title: Dynamic Navigation Menu
description: Create a navigation menu that dynamically updates based on the user's location on the webpage. The menu should be hidden on smaller screens and displayed on larger screens.

title: Image Gallery
description: Create an image gallery that allows users to navigate through images using previous and next buttons. The gallery should also display the current image and its description.

title: Quiz Game
description: Create a quiz game that displays questions and possible answers. The user's score should be updated in real-time, and the game should end when all questions have been answered.

title: Weather App
description: Create a weather app that displays the current weather and forecast for a given location. The app should update in real-time based on user input.

title: Timer App
description: Create a timer app that allows users to set a timer and receive notifications when the timer expires. The timer should be updated in real-time in the DOM.

title: Chat Bot
description: Create a chat bot that responds to user input. The chat bot should display its responses in the DOM, and the user's input should be cleared after each response.

title: Personal Finance Tracker
description: Create a personal finance tracker that allows users to add, remove, and edit expenses. The expenses should be stored in an array and updated in real-time in the DOM.

title: Simple Blog
description: Create a simple blog that displays a list of posts. Each post should have a title, description, and comments section. The comments should be stored in an array and updated in real-time in the DOM.

title: Game Leaderboard
description: Create a game leaderboard that displays the top 10 players with their scores. The leaderboard should be updated in real-time based on user input.
